prompt: An underground subway platform with white tiled walls, yellow safety lines along the platform edge, train tracks in the foreground, overhead fluorescent lights, and directional signage. A few commuters stand on the platform. To the left, the platform extends toward a staircase entrance with turnstiles and a digital route map on the wall. To the right, more vending machines line the wall near a bench and a pillar with a platform number sign. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level, looking down the length of the subway platform.

tracking_object.desc: brightly lit vending machine with colorful drink labels against the tiled wall

scene_adherence.visible_part: An underground subway platform has white tiled walls, yellow safety lines along the platform edge, train tracks in the foreground, overhead fluorescent lights, and directional signage. A few commuters stand on the platform.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: To the left, the platform extends toward a staircase entrance with turnstiles and a digital route map on the wall. To the right, more vending machines line the wall near a bench and a pillar with a platform number sign.
